author: mysticryuujin
content:
The best way to get involved is to simply get involved. Review open issues, review pull requests, test, comment, identify gaps. Everything you need to get started should be in the docs, if it's not, tell us what's missing or wrong. Open PRs to fix.

It's horribly vibe coded but I have a Claude skill that you can also read yourself to teach yourself how everything works from execution-apis specs, testgen, hive, and rpc-compat

https://github.com/MysticRyuujin/rpcwright
